query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS debug_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  source VARCHAR(100),
  message TEXT,
  data TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS debug_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  source VARCHAR(100),
  message TEXT,
  data TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
